hooks.command: echo "=== 会话开始 ==="; echo "分支: $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo '非 git 项目')"; echo "最近提交: $(git log -1 --oneline 2>/dev/null || echo '无')"; echo "=================="
bash -c 'branch=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ "$branch" = "main" ] || [ "$branch" = "master" ]; then echo "⚠️  警告：当前在受保护分支 $branch，请确认操作" >&2; fi'
